member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.IAuxiliaryExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending the Shops Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.IAuxiliaryExtensions.AddFunctions
member.summary: List of functions to add and use in expression engine.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Group of services used by Expression engine.
Group of services used by functions.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.ValueType
member.summary: Defines the data types.

member.summary: Integer.

member.summary: Double.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.ValueType.String
member.summary: String.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.StorageType
member.summary: Defines the different storage types.

member.summary: UserVar.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.StorageType.SharedStorage
member.summary: SharedStorage

member.summary: Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.EnableType.Disabled
member.summary: Disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.Expression
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the callback to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.DataType
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters to send to the callback.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.Storage
member.summary: Gets or sets the ResultToken storage type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.Datalog
member.summary: Gets or sets datalog enable type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.ResultToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of token where the evaluated result will be set.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.ResultPort
member.summary: Gets or sets an expression to set exit port based on result.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeAuxiliaryTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper.

Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Provide services that can be used by functions.

Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets userVar service.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions
member.summary: Functions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ToInt32(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and convert result value to 32-bit signed integer..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ToDouble(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and ToDouble.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ToString(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and returns a string that represents the current result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Random(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Invoque a pseudo-random number generator and return numbers that meet certain statistical requirements for randomness.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetDelimitedData(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expresions an extract Items from a Delimited String. E.g: GetDelimitedData(input, delimiter, index).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Length(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and gets the number of characters..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Substring(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and retrieves a substring from result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Bin2Dec(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression with binary result to decimal value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Bin2Hex(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression with binary result to hexadecimal value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Dec2Bin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression with decimal result to binary value..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Hex2Bin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression with hexadecimal result to binary value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Reverse(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and reverses the order of the result in a one-dimensional.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetPatSymbolString(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and gets string data into PatSymbol. Able to process binary, integer and hex representation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetCurrentDataBin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets current data bin from GetAllBins API.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetCurrentSoftBin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets current software bin from GetAllBins API.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetCurrentHardBin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets current hardware bin from GetAllBins API.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ExecCallback(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and use result in callback triggered.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.XorBitWise(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and performs the bitwise exclusive OR operation between the results of first and second expression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.OrBitWise(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and performs the bitwise OR operation between the results of first and second expression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.AndBitWise(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and performs the bitwise AND operation between the results of first and second expression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.NotBitWise(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and Inverts all the bit values in the result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Max(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and get the maximum value in a result sequence..

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Min(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and get the minimum value in a result sequence.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.IsMatch(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and check if first result is matching with the pattern of the second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Contains(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and check if first result contain the substring from the second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Replace(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and check if first result contain the substring of second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.LinearFit(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and performs a simple linear regression on the data using [Math.Numerics Fit.Line and GoodnessOfFit.RSquared].

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.LittleEndian(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expression and converts result a 32-bit Hex value from Big Endian to Little Endian at the byte level. Example: LittleEndian('78ABCDEF') returns 'EFCDAB78'.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.IndexOf(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and using the first result reports the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the specified value in second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.LastIndexOf(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and using the first result reports the the zero-based index position of the last occurrence of a specified value in second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.SelectArrayElements(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and using the first result as array extracts a new array in a string using the entered indexes range. Ex: SelectArrayElements('1,2,3', '1-2', ',').

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.SubtractArrays(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions with results as array with the same size subtract values. Ex: SubtractArrays('1,2,3', '1,0,0', ',').

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ScalarMultiplyArray(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions with the second result as array and multiples each element by the the first result as scalar. Ex: ScalarMultiplyArray(1000, '1,2,3', ',').

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ArrayMax(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and get the maximum value from result as Array using as delimiter the second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ArrayMin(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and get the minimum value from result as Array using as delimiter the second result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ArrayAverage(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and computes the average of a result sequence.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ArrayMedian(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and estimates the sample median from result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.Percentile(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and converts first result array to doubles and calculates the percentile p. p is an int. Second result as percentile, Third result as delimiter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.ArraySum(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and computes the sum of a first result sequence using the second result as delimiter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.IQR(NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate expressions and converts first result as string array to doubles and calculates the IQR (p75 - p25). Second result is used as delimiter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.Functions.GetDescription(System.Action{NCalc.FunctionArgs,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer})
member.summary: GetDescription.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices
member.summary: Services used by some functions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService,Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices.CallbacksService
member.summary: Gets callbacks service.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices.BinCounter
member.summary: Gets binCounter service.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.FunctionsServices.ConsoleService
member.summary: Gets console service.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.SpecSet
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.SpecSet.ReadToken(System.String,Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.TestConditionService.ITestConditionService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if a token exists, returns true if it does. Throws an exception if the token is not in SpecSet format.
member.param: SpecSet token name of the form S.[TL].Name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.BinaryToHex(System.String)
member.summary: String extension method. Convert the given binary string to a Hex string (no size restrictions).
member.exception: if the input data is null or empty.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.ToDouble(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Converts string with or without units to double value. Able to handle units multipliers and scientific notation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.RangeToList(System.String)
member.summary: Function to convert a string range into a list of integers. Example ranges: "3,6-8" becomes { 3, 6, 7, 8 }.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.ToBinaryString(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: BitArray extension method. Turns a BitArray into a string of 1s and 0s. The BitArray true maps to 1, while false maps to 0.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.ToBitArray(System.String)
member.summary: String extension method. Turns a string of 1s and 0s into a BitArray. A 1 in the string is a true in the BitArray, 0 (or any other character) is false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.GetPatSymbolString(System.String,System.Int32,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService)
member.summary: Gets string data into PatSymbol. Able to process binary, integer and hex representation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.HexToBinary(System.String,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,System.Int32)
member.summary: String extension method. Converts the Hexadecimal value into a binary value.
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.HexToBinary(System.Char,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,System.Int32)
member.summary: Char extension method. Converts the Hexadecimal character into a binary value.
member.param: Optional size to pad the result to.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.ResizeBinary(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Resizes the binary number. It will either pad (to the left) with 0s, or cut (from the left) extra bits.)
member.param: Expected size (0 means return as is).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.StringExtensions.ToInt(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Converts string to int32.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.TestProgramExtensions.GetCurrentFlowNumber(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns current instance flow number.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.TokenHandler.IsTokenFormatAndExists(System.String,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if a given string is in SharedStorage format ([ULI].[SDIO].Name) and returns true if it is and the token exists. Returns false if the format is wrong or the token doesn't exist.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.TokenHandler.ReadToken(Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reads a SharedStorage token and returns the value as a string.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form [ULI].[SDIO].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.TokenHandler.IsTokenFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a given string is in GSDS format (G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name) and returns true if it is.
member.returns: true if the token is in G.[ULI].[SDIO].Name format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.TokenHandler.WriteToken(Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,System.String,System.Object,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes a gsds token with the given value.
member.param: GSDS token name of the form G.[ULI].[SDI].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes
member.summary: Defines the valid Hdmt UserVariable types.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.BOOLEAN
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.DOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.INTEGER
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.STRING
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.ARRAYBOOLEAN
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.ARRAYDOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.ARRAYINTEGER
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes.ARRAYSTRING
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.TokenExists(Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the given UserVar exists, false otherwise.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable name of form collection.variable .

member.summary: Reads the value of the given Hdmt UserVariable without knowing the type. The parameter "type" will be updated with the actual type that was read.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
member.returns: Value as a string. ARRAY types will be a comma-separated string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.Read(Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes)
member.summary: Reads the value of the given Hdmt UserVariable.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
member.returns: Value as a string. ARRAY types will be a comma-separated string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.WriteResult(Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ExpressionEngine.UserVarHandler.ValidTypes,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a uservar of the given type.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
String value to write. It will be converted to the correct type, ARRAY types should be a comma-separated string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Group of services used by Expression engine.
Group of services used by functions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod.Callback
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the callback to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters to send to the callback.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod.ResultToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the GSDS token (of the form G.U.S.TokenName) to write the callbacks return value to.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod.ResultPort
member.summary: Gets or sets an expression to set exit port based on the callback return value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeRunCallbackTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.JsonSchemaValidator
member.summary: Validates the Json file has the correct format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.JsonSchemaValidator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.JsonSchemaValidator.ValidateFile(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Executes the validation for a file with the json schema.
member.param: If the method returns false, this field is populated with the errors.
member.returns: A value indicating if the file passed validation. If false, the errors field is populated with errors.
member.exception: Thrown if the file failed schema validation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Dff
member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.summary: Defines the .
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter
member.summary: Defines the .
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter in string form.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.ParameterType
member.summary: Gets the type of the parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.DataType
member.summary: Gets the Data type of the parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.Session
member.summary: Gets the SessionContext to use for this object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.GetValue
member.summary: Gets the current value of this parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.SetValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Writes the value to the parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.IsEqual(Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter)
member.summary: Checks if this parameter is equivalent to another parameter.
member.returns: true if both parameters have the same value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.IsGreaterThan(Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter)
member.summary: Checks if this parameter is greater than another parameter.
member.returns: true if this parameter greater than the other parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.IsLessThan(Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter)
member.summary: Checks if this parameter is less than another parameter.
member.returns: true if this parameter less than the other parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.InternalGetValue
member.summary: Gets the current value of this parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.Parameter.InternalSetValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Writes the value to the parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.SharedStorage
member.summary: Defines the .
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.SharedStorage.WriteToken(System.String,System.Object,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService)
member.summary: Writes a SharedStorage token with the given value.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form G.[ULI].[SDI].Name.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.SharedStorage.IsTokenFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a given string is in SharedStorage format (G.[Scope].[Type].TokenName) and returns true if it is.
member.returns: true if the token is in G.[Scope].[Type].TokenName format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.SharedStorage.ReadToken(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService)
member.summary: Reads a sharedStorage token and returns the value as a string.
member.param: SharedStorage token name of the form G.[Scope].[Type].TokenName.
member.exception: Thrown when the token is in the wrong format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar
member.summary: Defines the .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Text to add to errors, including line/file/parameter information for debug.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes
member.summary: Defines the valid Hdmt UserVariable types.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes.BOOLEAN
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes.DOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYDOUBLE
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYINTEGER
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes.ARRAYSTRING
member.summary: Boolean Type.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.Write(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.Parameters.UserVar.ValidTypes,System.Object,Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService)
member.summary: Writes a uservar of the given type.
member.param: Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable .
String value to write. It will be converted to the correct type, ARRAY types should be a comma-separated string.

members.member:
Reads the value of the given Hdmt UserVariable.
Hdmt UserVariable of the form collection.variable . Type of the Hdmt UserVariable. /// userVarService. Value as a string. ARRAY types will be a comma-separated string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeScreenTestTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for expressions evaluation. This TestMethod provides the capability of setting and compare UserVars, SharedStorage, Dff and literal values.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeScreenTestTestMethod.ScreenTestsFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of the screen tests file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.PrimeScreenTestTestMethod.ScreenTestSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the screenSet to execute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFile
member.summary: Defines the . This class represents an entire ScreenTest File.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: ScreenTest file as a list of string.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFile.ScreenTestSets
member.summary: Gets the Dictionary of all ScreenSets in this file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFile.GetFile(System.String,Prime.FileService.IFileService)
member.summary: Wrapper function for Prime GetFile which actually prints out the name of the file if it isn't found or GetFile fails.
member.param: Filename to create a local copy of.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFile.IsSchemaValidationEnabled
member.summary: Returns if the schema validation should be processed for the configuration files handled by Aleph. By default schema validation is disabled. But if IsSysCFileServiceUp = False (not a VPO or Production) the validation is enabled automatically. This is to avoid the user to be aware of enabling the validation for local/eng runs or forget to set to False the parameter in a production TP to save init time.
member.returns: True if schema validation for configuration files should be executed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.Load(System.String,Prime.FileService.IFileService)
member.summary: Reads a JSON File and returns the parsed object.
member.param: The JSON File with remote path to be parsed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.ScreenConfig
member.summary: Storages the JsonScreenConfig to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.ScreenConfig.JsonScreenConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets the different Screen functions to execute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.ScreenOptions
member.summary: Definition for entries to be included in json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.ScreenOptions.TestName
member.summary: Gets or sets the test name to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenFormatJson.ScreenOptions.TestConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets the test configuration.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenSet
member.summary: Defines the . This class represents collection of Screen Tests in a Set which will be executed during a test instance.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Name of the file this set is in.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenSet.Add(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Decodes and adds the test to this Set from a JSON file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenSet.Add(System.ValueTuple{System.Int32,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Decodes and adds the test to this Set from a text file.
member.param: Line number of this test, and Test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenSet.Verify
member.summary: Validate this ScreenTest Set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenSet.Execute(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Executes the set.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest
member.summary: Defines the . This class represents single line in a ScreenTest File (a single Screen Test).
Initializes a new instance of the class from a text file.
member.param: Name of the file this line was read from.
Line number of this test, and Test.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a JSON struct.
member.param: Name of the file this line was read from, and Line number of this line in the file.
test columns from a json screetest object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations
member.summary: Allowed operations on the parameters.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.SET
member.summary: SET operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.APPEND
member.summary: APPEND operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.GT
member.summary: GREATER-THAN operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.LT
member.summary: LESS-THAN operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.GTE
member.summary: GREATER-THAN-OR-EQUAL operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.LTE
member.summary: LESS-THAN-OR-EQAL operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.EQ
member.summary: IS-EQUAL operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.NE
member.summary: IS-NOT-EQUAL operation.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedOperations.UNDEF
member.summary: Undefined/NotUsed operation.

member.summary: Allowed types for the DATATYPE column.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.INT
member.summary: INTEGER type (shortcut).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.INTEGER
member.summary: INTEGER type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.DOUBLE
member.summary: DOUBLE type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.STRING
member.summary: STRING type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.BINARY
member.summary: BINARY type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedDataTypes.UNDEF
member.summary: Undefined/NotUsed type.

member.summary: CUSTOM type.

member.summary: GLOBAL/UserVar type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedParamType.USERVAR
member.summary: GLOBAL/UserVar type.

member.summary: SharedStorage type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.AllowedParamType.FUNCTION
member.summary: FUNCTION type.

member.summary: TEMP type.

member.summary: EXPRESSION type.

member.summary: UNDEF/Unused type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.Name
member.summary: Gets the name for this test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.VerifyNext(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Verify the OnTrue and OnFalse point to valid ports/tests.
member.param: List of all the valid tests in this set.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.FlowExpressionHandling.ScreenTest.Execute(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the test and returns the next test/port to execute.
member.returns: Next test to execute or exit port.
